examples.eng: Go and get dressed!
Look at the way he's dressed!
A lady dressed in red
I dressed quickly.
He came out dressed in white.
examples.ru: Он вышел, одетый во всё белое.

examples.eng: Dad dressed up as Santa Claus.
She was dressed very ordinarily.
She always dressed in good taste.
Alice dressed swiftly.
He was smartly dressed.
Aren't you dressed yet?
She was dressed in black.
He was dressed real sharp.
She always dressed very tight.
She dressed warmly for skiing.
examples.ru: Для катания на лыжах она оделась тепло.

examples.eng: She's always expensively dressed.
examples.ru: Она всегда дорого одета. (одета в дорогую одежду)

examples.eng: I shaved and showered and dressed.
examples.ru: Я побрился, принял душ и оделся.

examples.eng: They dressed themselves in a hurry.
He was handsome and nicely dressed.
examples.ru: Он был красив и хорошо одет.

examples.eng: The twins were dressed alike.
We were dressed up as pirates.
We dressed him up as a gorilla.
examples.ru: Мы одели его в костюм гориллы.

examples.eng: I dressed quickly and went out.
examples.ru: Я быстро оделся и вышел (на улицу).

examples.eng: He dressed up in a suit and tie.
examples.ru: Он нарядился в костюм и галстук.

examples.eng: She had arrived dressed in pink.
She was dressed in black velvet.
examples.ru: Она была одета в чёрный бархат.

examples.eng: He dressed in a slovenly manner.
She dressed with simple elegance.
His widow was dressed in mourning.
examples.ru: Его вдова была одета в траур.

examples.eng: He dressed the child in a snowsuit.
examples.ru: Он одел ребёнка в зимний комбинезон.
